query:
ALTER TABLE forecasts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS geography VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currency VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS baseRevenue DECIMAL(15,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ebitdaMargin DECIMAL(5,4),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS growthRate DECIMAL(5,4),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS assumptions TEXT;

ALTER TABLE forecast_history
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS month VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenue DECIMAL(15,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ebitda DECIMAL(15,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sortOrder INT;
